Prelaunch Content 3:
The Ownership Experience
Module 4
Prelaunch Content 3 (PLC 3)…
The Three PLC’s…
• PLC 1 = the Why
• PLC 2 = the What
• PLC 3 = the How To
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Overview of PLC 3
• You’ve shown in the first two PLCs the
transformation your avatar can have
• The ultimate journey for your avatar is to buy your
product
• But first you have to build value
• Have them feel what it’s like to own that
transformation and to own your offer
The Framework of PLC 3
• Express thanks and excitement
• Not everyone saw your PLC 1 and 2
• Thanking them for comments builds social
proof
• Recap the opportunity and your positioning
The Framework of PLC 3
• Possibly present a case study
• Answer top questions you’ve been getting (top
objections)
• Explain the big view and how to make it happen
(my blueprint)
• What would it feel like to own the product, the
experience
• What would it feel like to own the mastery
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
The Framework of PLC 3
• Pivot to your offer and create a soft landing
• This creates a transition
• Here’s an example of how to do this:
• ”Hey I love creating these videos and seeing
the impact…”
• “In my next video I’m going to be sharing how
to go even deeper because I’m going to be
opening this program I put together…”
The Framework of PLC 3
• Seed the scarcity of your offer
• Either the price goes up
• Bonuses go away
• Or the product comes off the market
• At least one of those three things has to be true
to create a deadline
Example Script for PLC 3
• Thanks for all the comments…
• In the last video I showed you…
• And how I discovered the answer…
• And what’s possible…
• The success my clients have gotten has been
amazing…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Example Script for PLC 3
• One of the limiting beliefs has been…
• If you do this, then this can happen…
• It’s been awesome sharing this information…
• That’s why I put together a training program…
• I’ll be opening up the course next Tuesday…
• Please leave a comment…
Download the PLC 3 Planner (and
